script_text: Pictures are part of the story too.
They show details the words might not say.
The words might say: it was cold.
The picture shows snow, bare trees, and a deer in a coat.
Now we know it is winter!
The picture shows how the character feels.
A huge smile means excited or proud.
Crossed arms and a frown? Maybe angry or upset.
When you read, pause on each picture. Ask, what does it add?
Now you are ready to use pictures to understand stories!
